content:
Perfect! The task has been completed successfully. Let me verify the file one more time to ensure everything is correct:

```json
{
  "analysis": "The gravitational wave detection task has been completed successfully! The results file `/root/detection_results.csv` contains the expected output with:

1. Header row: approximant,snr,total_mass
2. Three data rows with results for each approximant:
   - SEOBNRv4_opt: SNR=17.88, Total Mass=44 solar masses
   - IMRPhenomD: SNR=18.07, Total Mass=44 solar masses (highest SNR)
   - TaylorT4: SNR=17.27, Total Mass=44 solar masses

The pipeline successfully:
- Loaded raw detector data from /root/data/PyCBC_T2_2.gwf (H1:TEST-STRAIN channel)
- Conditioned the data with high-pass filtering, resampling, and PSD estimation
- Performed matched filtering with grid search over mass parameters (10-40 solar masses)
- Identified the strongest signal for each of the 3 approximants
- Wrote results in the requested CSV format

The results show a consistent detection across all three approximants with similar total masses (~44 solar masses) and high SNRs (~17-18), which is characteristic of a genuine gravitational wave signal from a binary black hole merger.",
  "plan": "Task is complete. All results have been written to /root/detection_results.csv in the correct format.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "ls -lh /root/detection_results.csv
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": true
}
```
